title: Although Of Course You End Up Becoming Your Parents Parallel Parental Relationships in 3010
display_title: Although Of Course You End Up Becoming Your Parents Parallel Parental Relationships in 3010
wikitext:
[]: Although Of Course You End Up Becoming Your Parents: Parallel Parental Relationships in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Sun Aug 15, 2021 7:53 pm *Rough vomit of ideas, this is not even at the level of a rough draft of a rough draft, but I wanted to share while the ideas are still fresh in my mind. “Did you try to understand your father?” - Rei (NGE, 2.0) “I tried to understand.” - Shinji (NGE, 2.0)

[]: Re: Although Of Course You End Up Becoming Your Parents: Parallel Parental Relationships in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sun Aug 15, 2021 9:15 pm In the Instrumentality, there is also a curious situation where it's established (at different points) that Shinji, Kaworu and Gendo are alike. There is also the visuals that connect Rei and Yui at many moments.

[]: Re: Although Of Course You End Up Becoming Your Parents: Parallel Parental Relationships in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Mon Aug 16, 2021 10:00 am Yeah, at first I saw absolutely no point in Kaji Jr. He appears once, has like 2 lines and never appears again. Once it all comes together it makes sense. It truly brings Misato full circle in a way NGE couldn't.

[]: Re: Although Of Course You End Up Becoming Your Parents: Parallel Parental Relationships in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Aug 16, 2021 1:57 pm SEELE-01 wrote: Yeah, at first I saw absolutely no point in Kaji Jr. He appears once, has like 2 lines and never appears again.

[]: Re: Although Of Course You End Up Becoming Your Parents: Parallel Parental Relationships in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Mon Aug 16, 2021 3:51 pm Yeah, that's want I meant. It is until then that it dawns to me what was the point of the character... Misato-wise...

[]: Re: Although Of Course You End Up Becoming Your Parents: Parallel Parental Relationships in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by aboose » Mon Aug 16, 2021 7:38 pm Shinji meeting Kaji Jr is also significant to Shinji's realization that the world doesn't revolve around him and that there are people who are trying to live and make a life even in the desecrated world.

[]: Re: Although Of Course You End Up Becoming Your Parents: Parallel Parental Relationships in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Mon Aug 23, 2021 10:10 pm evaunit13 wrote: We will invariably become our parents. Thus, to grow up is to understand them.

[]: Re: Although Of Course You End Up Becoming Your Parents: Parallel Parental Relationships in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Tue Aug 24, 2021 11:11 am Of course we're talking about fiction; people also don't monologue while fighting in overlapping complex-number real-imaginary realms. "Turning into your parent" is a trope , see Star Wars for an example (the Luke:Anakin relationship analogizes quite neatly to Shinji:Gendo, especially the shot of Luke's head in Vader's helmet and young Gendo looking exactly like Shinji with glasses): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-GzDnW_EDb8 My father's father was extremely abusive. My father isn't, but I can see his father's traits in him and in me, but accepted those tendencies and turned them towards 'good' endeavors. Whatever absurd flaws I find in my parents comes to make sense once I think about the context in which they were raised. I'll admit the "invariably" part is too strong; this was a draft. However it's on the onus of us to take the good and leave the bad, which requires dialogue and understanding. Perhaps the title should've been: You Are (Not) Your Parents.

[]: Re: Although Of Course You End Up Becoming Your Parents: Parallel Parental Relationships in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 24, 2021 2:27 pm evaunit13 wrote: "Turning into your parent" is a trope".
